summary.title: Web Application Threat Model
summary.description:
This threat model describes the security architecture of a web application system. 
The system includes a human user accessing the web application through HTTPS. 
The web application communicates with backend services that process requests 
and interact with a SQL database and file storage system. 

The model identifies potential security threats using the STRIDE methodology 
and proposes mitigations to protect system components and data flows.
